_comment: Red-team corpus (docs/03 SR-3, docs/07 Phase 4 DoD): adversarial strings that MUST be caught, plus benign strings that MUST pass (over-blocking a support app is its own harm). Run by RedTeamSuiteTest (shared/domain jvmTest, part of `check`) — a regression here fails the build. Expectations: guard_blocks = SafetyRules.violatesAny (AI OUTPUT is withheld+replaced); crisis_handoff = CrisisSignals.suggestsCrisis (user INPUT triggers warm hand-off before any AI call); passes = neither trips. Grow per language with T&S/advisor input (en/de/ur starter — docs/12 §3).
